name: Norwegian Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the sugar and softened butter until light and fluffy. Add vanilla extract and eggs, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the flour, baking powder, and chocolate chips until just combined.
4. Divide the dough into four equal portions. On a lightly floured surface, shape each portion into a roll about 1 inch in diameter and approximately 15 inches long.
5. Place the rolls on ungreased cookie sheets, flattening slightly with the tines of a fork to an even thickness of about 5/8 inch.
6. Sprinkle the sugar and cinnamon mixture evenly over the rolls.
7. Bake for 13 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned on the edges. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to avoid breaking.
This recipe comes from "BETTY CROCKER CONTEST WINNERS" Feb.1992.
